hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(auth|session|db\.js|migrate|spaceStore|projectStore|Dockerfile|config\.js)" && echo "" && echo "  ● High-signal file edited: $FILE" && echo "    If this revealed something non-obvious → ./scripts/capture-rule.sh" && echo ""; exit 0'
